x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Legal document volume reflects the content available for Now Assist to analyze, summarize, and reference when generating legal guidance. Adequate document volume improves the quality of AI-generated recommendations and search results.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure legal documents are being uploaded and tracked in the LSD module.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_17f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c3f
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Legal document volume reflects the content available for Now Assist to analyze, summarize, and reference when generating legal guidance. Adequate document volume improves the quality of AI-generated recommendations and search results.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Legal Document Volume</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("sn_lg_contracts_repository");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table sn_lg_contracts_repository not found", finding: "Legal Contract Repository table is not available. Verify the Legal Service Delivery plugin is active." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("sn_lg_contracts_repository");
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var c = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    if (c >= 50) return { status: "ready", actualValue: c + " legal documents", finding: c + " legal contract documents found. Now Assist LSD has sufficient document data for AI-assisted legal summarization and review." };
    if (c > 0) return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: c + " legal documents", finding: c + " legal document(s) found (target: 50+). Limited document volume reduces Now Assist LSD AI summarization accuracy." };
    return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "0 legal documents", finding: "No legal contract documents found. Now Assist LSD requires document data for AI-assisted legal review and summarization." };
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>LSD</module><number>CHK0000591</number><order/><remediation_guidance>Ensure legal documents are being uploaded and tracked in the LSD module.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:21</sys_created_on><sys_id>17f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c3f</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Legal Document Volume</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_17f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c3f</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
